structures.name: Breeding Farm
structures.description: Assign one male and one female Pal to produce eggs. Placing Cake in the facility is required for production.

structures.name: Alarm Bell
structures.description: Bell that sets the alert status for Pals on base. Change Pal behavior to either attack invading enemies, or focus entirely on work whenever you like.

structures.name: Ancient Turret
structures.description: An unmanned turret of ancient technology equipped with rocket launcher–level size and firepower. It requires no ammunition or Pal assignment, and performs fully automated interception using only electricity. However, despite its immense power, it requires a massive amount of electricity to operate.

structures.name: Bear Trap (Large)
structures.description: A bear trap to immobilize large Pals. The capture rate with the sphere increases when a Pal is trapped. Only effective on large Pals, small Pals will not be caught.

structures.name: Bear Trap (Small)
structures.description: Trap that immobilizes Pals who step on it. The capture rate with the sphere increases when a Pal is trapped. Only effective on small Pals.

structures.name: Defensive Wall
structures.description: Massive defensive wall to prevent enemy intrusions. Made from stone, it is reasonably sturdy.

structures.name: Electric Mine
structures.description: Trap that electrocutes the Pal that steps on it. The electrocuted Pal has a higher capture rate with the sphere.

structures.name: Hanging Trap
structures.description: Trap that catches Pals passing through it. Pals caught in the trap are easier to catch with Spheres. Only effective on small Pals.

structures.name: Ice Mine
structures.description: Trap that freezes the Pal that steps on it. The frozen Pal has a higher capture rate with the sphere.

structures.name: Iron Gate
structures.description: Gate large enough for big Pals to pass through. Made from metal, it is extremely durable.

structures.name: Metal Defensive Wall
structures.description: Massive defensive wall to prevent enemy intrusions. Made from metal, it is extremely durable.

structures.name: Mine
structures.description: Trap that explodes when a Pal steps on it. It deals damage to a wide area.

structures.name: Mounted Crossbow
structures.description: A defensive installation for protecting a base from enemies. When a Pal with Handiwork suitability is assigned, it will continuously defend the base using a crossbow.

structures.name: Mounted Machine Gun
structures.description: A defensive installation for protecting a base from enemies. When a Pal with Handiwork suitability is assigned, it will continuously defend the base using a machine gun.

structures.name: Mounted Missile Launcher
structures.description: A defensive installation for protecting a base from enemies. When a Pal with Handiwork suitability is assigned, it will continuously defend the base using a missile launcher.

structures.name: Moving panels
structures.description: A description of the moving panel

structures.name: Sandbag
structures.description: A defensive installation for protecting a base from enemies. When a Pal is assigned, it will stop other work and stay on lookout and prepare for combat.

structures.name: Stone Gate
structures.description: Gate large enough for big Pals to pass through. Made from stone, it is reasonably sturdy.

structures.name: Wooden Defensive Wall
structures.description: Massive defensive wall to prevent enemy intrusions. Made from wood, it breaks easily.

structures.name: Wooden Gate
structures.description: Gate large enough for big Pals to pass through. Made from wood, it breaks easily.

structures.name: Fishing Pond
structures.description: A ready-to-use fishing pond. Assign a Pal to fish here at their own leisure. Requires Pals that can work with their hands.

structures.name: Ancient Farm
structures.description: A special cultivation device based on ancient technology that harnesses the power of the World Tree to grow all kinds of plants on Palpagos Island. Smaller than a berry plantation and suitable for indoor placement, it still follows the same cultivation process as standard plots. It requires Pals with high-level Planting, Watering, and Harvesting suitability.

structures.name: Ancient Kitchen
structures.description: A special kitchen based on ancient technology that can create everything from existing dishes to entirely new recipes. It retains heat through fire and completes cooking with manual preparation, allowing it to prepare any kind of cuisine. It requires Pals with high-level Kindling and Handiwork suitability.

structures.name: Berry Plantation
structures.description: A farm that can grow Red Berries . Harvest time is quick, but eating them doesn't provide much sustenance. Requires a few Pals to plant seeds, water, and harvest the crops.

structures.name: Campfire
structures.description: Needed for cooking food. It can only be used to grill simple ingredients. Requires a Fire Pal to light a flame.

structures.name: Carrot Plantation
structures.description: A farm where you can grow Carrot . It takes time to harvest, but increases the variety of meals you can prepare. Requires a few Pals to plant seeds, water, and harvest the crops.

structures.name: Cold Food Box
structures.description: A feeding box that can be kept cold. Assign an Ice Pal to it and the food inside will be less likely to spoil.

structures.name: Cooking Pot
structures.description: Needed for cooking food. Use of a cooking pot allows for a wider variety of meal preparation. Requires a Fire Pal to light a flame.

structures.name: Electric Kitchen
structures.description: Needed for cooking food. It requires electricity to run, but allows a large amount of meals to be prepared rapidly. Requires a Fire Pal to light a flame.

structures.name: Feed Box
structures.description: A box for storing Pal food. Pals can feed from it when hungry. Make sure to keep it well-stocked to keep your Pals happy.

structures.name: Large-Scale Stone Oven
structures.description: Needed for cooking food. By becoming larger, multiple Pals can cooperate to cook together. Requires a Fire Pal to light a flame.

structures.name: Lettuce Plantation
structures.description: A farm that can grow Lettuce . It takes time to harvest, but increases the variety of meals you can prepare. Requires a few Pals to plant seeds, water, and harvest the crops.

structures.name: Onion Plantation
structures.description: A farm where you can grow Onion . It takes time to harvest, but increases the variety of meals you can prepare. Requires a few Pals to plant seeds, water, and harvest the crops.

structures.name: Potato Plantation
structures.description: A farm where you can grow Potato . It takes time to harvest, but increases the variety of meals you can prepare. Requires a few Pals to plant seeds, water, and harvest the crops.

structures.name: Skillfruit Orchard
structures.description: A farm where Skillfruits can be cultivated. By planting the original fruit in the ground, multiple fruits of the same type can be harvested.

structures.name: Tomato Plantation
structures.description: A farm that can grow Tomato . They take time to harvest, but increase the variety of meals you can prepare. Requires a few Pals to plant seeds, water, and harvest the crops.

structures.name: Wheat Plantation
structures.description: A farm that can grow Wheat . It requires an average amount of time to harvest. Requires a few Pals to plant seeds, water, and harvest crops.

structures.name: Ancient Corner Roof
structures.description: A corner roof built on top of walls to keep out the rain and wind. Recreates the architectural style of ancient civilizations.

structures.name: Ancient Diagonal Wall
structures.description: An angled wall built on triangular foundations to keep out intruders. Recreates the architectural style of ancient civilizations.

structures.name: Ancient Fence

structures.name: Antique Brown Floor Lamp
structures.description: Antique brown floor lamp that provides illumination. Requires electricity to light.

structures.name: Antique Red Floor Lamp
structures.description: Antique red floor lamp that provides illumination. Requires electricity to light.

structures.name: Brick Fireplace
structures.description: Brick fireplace that provides illumination. Must be lit with fire from a Fire Pal.

structures.name: Ceiling Lamp
structures.description: A light source that provides illumination to a base even at night. It can be placed on a ceiling. Requires electricity, but lights up a larger area.

structures.name: Ceremonial Candlestick
structures.description: An imposing ceremonial candlestick lit by the Brothers of the Eternal Pyre and revered as sacred. It can be placed on the ground. Requires a Fire Pal to light a flame.

structures.name: Chandelier
structures.description: Chandelier that provides illumination. Requires electricity to light.

structures.name: Double Street Lamp
structures.description: Double street lamp that provides illumination. Requires electricity to light.

structures.name: Fireplace
structures.description: Fireplace that provides illumination. Must be lit with fire from a Fire Pal.

structures.name: Japanese Paper Lantern
structures.description: Decorative Paper Lantern. Perfect for Japanese-style buildings.

structures.name: Lamp
structures.description: A light source that provides illumination to a base even at night. Requires electricity, but lights up a larger area.

structures.name: Large Ceiling Lamp
structures.description: A light source that provides illumination to a base even at night. It can be placed on a ceiling. Requires a significant amount of electricity, but lights up an even larger area.

structures.name: Large Mounted Lamp
structures.description: A light source that provides illumination to a base even at night. Requires a significant amount of electricity, but lights up an even larger area.

structures.name: Majestic Candlestick
structures.description: An imposing candlestick lit by the Brothers of the Eternal Pyre and revered as sacred. It can be placed on the ground. Requires a Fire Pal to light a flame.

structures.name: Majestic Wall Torch
structures.description: An imposing torch lit by the Brothers of the Eternal Pyre and revered as sacred. It can be placed on walls. Requires a Fire Pal to light a flame.

structures.name: Mounted Torch
structures.description: A light source that provides illumination to a base even at night. Requires a Fire Pal to light a flame.

structures.name: Paper Lantern
structures.description: Decorative paper lantern.

structures.name: Red Wooden Lantern
structures.description: Decorative red wooden lantern.

structures.name: Retro Street Lamp
structures.description: Retro street lamp that provides illumination. Requires electricity to light.

structures.name: Simple Street Lamp
structures.description: Simple street lamp that provides illumination. Requires electricity to light.

structures.name: Stylish Street Lamp
structures.description: Stylish street lamp that provides illumination. Requires electricity to light.

structures.name: Wall Lamp
structures.description: Wall lamp that provides illumination. Requires electricity to light.

structures.name: Wall Torch
structures.description: A light source that provides illumination to a base even at night. It can be placed on walls. Requires a Fire Pal to light a flame.

structures.name: Alpha Wave Generator
structures.description: A device that emits alpha waves to help Pals relax. Slows the rate at which the SAN value of Base Pals decreases. Placing more than one has no additional effect.

structures.name: Beta Wave Generator
structures.description: A device that emits beta waves to energize Pals. Increases the work speed of Base Pals. Placing more than one has no additional effect.

structures.name: Electric Pylon
structures.description: Place in base to improve electricity generating speed. Placing more than one has no additional effect.

structures.name: Flame Cauldron
structures.description: Place in base to improve fire-making speed. Placing more than one has no additional effect.

structures.name: Flea Market (Items)
structures.description: A facility for selling items. By setting products in the sales list, you can sell items to other players. Assign an Ice Pal to it and the food inside will be less likely to spoil.

structures.name: Flea Market (Pals)
structures.description: A facility for selling Pals. By setting Pals in the sales list, you can sell them to other players. Assign an Ice Pal to it and the food inside will be less likely to spoil.

structures.name: Flower Bed
structures.description: Place in base to improve gathering speed. Placing more than one has no additional effect.

structures.name: Large Toolbox
structures.description: Place in base to improve handiwork speed. Placing more than one has no additional effect.

structures.name: Pickaxe and Helmet
structures.description: Place in base to improve mining speed. Placing more than one has no additional effect.

structures.name: Sign
structures.description: Can be written on. Use for memos or to communicate with others.

structures.name: Silo
structures.description: Place in base to improve planting speed. Placing more than one has no additional effect.

structures.name: Snowman
structures.description: Place in base to improve cooling speed. Placing more than one has no additional effect.

structures.name: Stump and Axe
structures.description: Place in base to improve logging speed. Placing more than one has no additional effect.

structures.name: Tombstone
structures.description: A gravestone that can be inscribed with text. Use it for recording purposes.

structures.name: Training Dummy
structures.description: Training dummy shaped like a Pengullet . Can only be placed in wide open areas.

structures.name: Wall-Mounted Sign
structures.description: A signboard to write on. Can be hung on walls.

structures.name: Water Fountain
structures.description: Place in base to improve watering speed. Placing more than one has no additional effect.

structures.name: Witch Cauldron
structures.description: Place in base to improve medicine manufacturing speed. Placing more than one has no additional effect.

structures.name: WoodCreator
structures.description: en Text

structures.name: Pal Expedition Station
structures.description: A facility that allows Pals to be sent on expeditions to places like dungeons. The dispatched Pals engage in battles and gather items, bringing back resources to the base.

structures.name: Brothers of the Eternal Pyre Flag Set
PAL Genetic Research Unit Flag Set
Advanced Chest
structures.description: Stores items. Quite sturdy, with plenty of storage space. It is useful as a large, secure storage box.

structures.name: Antique Bookshelf
structures.description: Antique bookshelf for storing items.

structures.name: Antique Cabinet
structures.description: Antique cabinet for storing items.

structures.name: Antique Chest
structures.description: Antique chest for storing items. Adorned with a photo of a Pal.

structures.name: Antique Long Cabinet
structures.description: Antique long cabinet for storing items. Adorned with a photo of a Pal.

structures.name: Antique Side Chest
structures.description: Antique side chest for storing items. Adorned with a photo of a Pal.

structures.name: Antique Wall Cabinet
structures.description: Antique cabinet for storing items. Can be placed on walls.

structures.name: Antique Wardrobe
structures.description: Antique wardrobe for storing items.

structures.name: Cloth Covered Container
structures.description: Cloth covered container for storing items.

structures.name: Cooler Box
structures.description: Small food vault. Assign an Ice Pal to help prevent food stored inside from spoiling.

structures.name: Guild Chest
structures.description: A chest that can instantly send and receive items through subspace. The items inside are shared across all bases where it is placed.

structures.name: Iron Shelf
structures.description: Iron shelf for storing items.

structures.name: Iron Wall Shelf
structures.description: Iron wall shelf for storing items. Can be placed on a wall.

structures.name: Item Retrieval Machine
structures.description: A device that lets you freely access items from all chests in the base.

structures.name: Japanese-Style Chest
structures.description: Stores items. Perfect for Japanese-style buildings.

structures.name: Large Antique Cabinet
structures.description: Large antique cabinet for storing items.

structures.name: Large Container
structures.description: Large container for storing items. Imitates the designs left behind by an ancient and prosperous civilization.

structures.name: Locker
structures.description: Locker for storing items. Decorated with Pal stickers.

structures.name: Long Iron Shelf
structures.description: Long iron shelf for storing items.

structures.name: Metal Chest
structures.description: Stores items. Reinforced with metal, it is somewhat durable. The increased size allows for the storage of more things.

structures.name: Orange Locker
structures.description: Orange locker for storing items. Decorated with Pal stickers.

structures.name: Refined Metal Chest
structures.description: Stores items. Made of iron, it is extremely durable. It is useful as a large, secure storage box.

structures.name: Refrigerator
structures.description: Large food vault. Assign an Ice Pal to help prevent food stored inside from spoiling.

structures.name: Small Container
structures.description: Small container for storing items.

structures.name: Wooden Barrel
structures.description: Wooden barrel for storing items.

structures.name: Wooden Barrel Shelf
structures.description: Wooden barrel shelf for storing items.

structures.name: Wooden Box
structures.description: Wooden box for storing items.

structures.name: Wooden Chest
structures.description: Stores items. Made from wood, it breaks easily. It's probably not the best thing to store valuables in.

structures.name: Wooden Shelf
structures.description: Wooden shelf for storing items.

structures.name: Wooden Wall Shelf
structures.description: Wooden shelf for storing items. Can be placed on a wall.

note: Production.html and Infrastructure.html exports are empty shells; some production buildings may be filled from Technologies Structures unlocks.
